ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the state */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the state was established */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_birds" (
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state bird */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the bird belongs */,
  "bird_name" TEXT /* Name of the state bird */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state bird */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the state bird */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bird_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_birds_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state animal */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the animal belongs */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the state animal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state animal */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the state animal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_animals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state tree */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the tree belongs */,
  "tree_name" TEXT /* Name of the state tree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state tree */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the state tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_trees_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_flowers" (
  "flower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state flower */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the flower belongs */,
  "flower_name" TEXT /* Name of the state flower */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state flower */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the state flower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_flowers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chief_ministers" (
  "cm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chief minister */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the chief minister belongs */,
  "cm_name" TEXT /* Name of the chief minister */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the chief minister's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the chief minister's term */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the chief minister */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Official email address of the chief minister */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Official phone number of the chief minister */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the chief minister */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chief_ministers_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governors" (
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governor */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the governor belongs */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the governor */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the governor's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the governor's term */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the governor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Official email address of the governor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Official phone number of the governor */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the governor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governors_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the file belongs */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, document, multimedia) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for retrieval */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_files_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file revision */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file to which the revision belongs */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_revisions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES state_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser and device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the search query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the search query was made */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the search query */,
  "query_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the query */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., state-wise comparison, governance performance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the rating belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report to which the tag belongs */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag revision */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag to which the revision belongs */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_revisions_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_capitals" (
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state capital */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state to which the capital belongs */,
  "capital_name" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_capitals_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_capital_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state capital revision */,
  "capital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state capital to which the revision belongs */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_capital_revisions_capital_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_id") REFERENCES state_capitals ("capital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chief_minister_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chief minister revision */,
  "cm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chief minister to which the revision belongs */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chief_minister_revisions_cm_id FOREIGN KEY ("cm_id") REFERENCES chief_ministers ("cm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "governor_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each governor revision */,
  "governor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the governor to which the revision belongs */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_governor_revisions_governor_id FOREIGN KEY ("governor_id") REFERENCES governors ("governor_id")
)
